hero.subtitle: Crafting innovative solutions that bridge creativity and technology — driving tangible results and elevating user experiences.

skills.label: What I Do
skills.title: Services*Expertise
skills.description: Bringing a unique blend of technical expertise and artistic vision to every project.

about.label: About Me
about.title: The*Story
about.bio1: I'm a versatile professional with a background in electrical engineering and industrial design. Over the years, I've blended engineering expertise with a keen eye for design, delivering impactful solutions across multiple industries.
about.bio2: Specializing in software engineering and web development, I'm passionate about crafting seamless user experiences and building visually stunning applications. My combination of technical skills and design sensibility allows me to create innovative solutions that captivate users and drive growth.

dev.title: Software Development
dev.description: Full-stack development with modern frameworks. From cross-platform apps to web applications and APIs.

design.title: Concept Design
design.description: Transforming ideas into visually stunning designs. Specialized in web design, UI/UX, and game concept art.

3d.title: 3D Design
3d.description: Creating realistic and immersive 3D models for various industries. Props, products, and sceneries.

footer.ctaText: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it.
footer.tagline: Software engineer & designer crafting digital experiences at the intersection of code and creativity.
